title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at LG Soft India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at LG Soft India
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India:
LG Soft India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India!
